title: Record soft35 async24 and hard64 densify

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft35 Async24 Hard64 Contract

## Soft 35
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.35 with quality bias floor 0.33 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Async 24
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.24 so reclaim starts earlier

## Hard 64
hard compaction block ratio defaults to 0.64 and absolute trigger to 50k so long sessions reclaim earlier

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status vitest
